name: Murderous Knights Raid
description:
Realistic Medieval Knights

14th Century
His majesty's orders were to raid and plunder enemy resources...

Villagers are enemy resources.

...

Lore
At the peak of his power, King Edward III of England sent his son, Edward "the Black Prince", to ravage the southern realms of France while the rest pushed from north - Together, they plan to smother their oldest enemy.

Early on, the Black Prince realised it is much harder to battle armoured men than to battle peasants which contribute greatly, passively yet very much so, to the French war effort. Hence, he sent the royal decree;

"Ravage"

...

Scenario
You reside on the village of Pompuille. Here, the local pride and fortune lay for the brewery, where beer gets fermented from a special kind of rice, found only from the shores of Camargue. Many say it gives a little more spike than the usual brands of rum. Well, a shame they will burn.

...

CW: Plausible implications of sexual violence, torture, animal abuse

...
creator: Lifecraft
